batchCall(bytes[]).details: Process a batch of encoded handler calls in a single transaction. Uses delegatecall to self so msg.sender is preserved and storage writes happen in this contract's context. Atomic, any failure reverts the entire batch.

params.calls: - array of ABI-encoded handler function calls

currentEpoch().details: Returns the current authority set epoch.

handleConsensus(address,bytes).details: Handle incoming consensus messages using IConsensusV2. Verifies the proof, stores the new consensus state and intermediate states, and records the relayer for the new authority set epoch if one occurred.

handleGetRequestTimeouts(address,((bytes.details: Check the provided Get request timeouts, then dispatch to modules

handleGetResponses(address,(((uint256,ui.details: check response proofs, message delay and timeouts, then dispatch get responses to modules

handlePostRequestTimeouts(address,((byte.details: Checks the provided timed-out requests and their proofs, before dispatching them to their relevant destination modules

handlePostRequests(address,(((uint256,ui.details: Checks the provided requests and their proofs, before dispatching them to their relevant destination modules

relayerOf(uint256).details: Returns the relayer address for a given authority set ID.

returns._0: the relayer address, or address(0) if not set
